practicals.title: Practical 1: Linear Algebra using Python
practicals.desc: Create a 3x3 matrix, compute determinant and inverse, and solve linear equations using NumPy.

practicals.title: Practical 2: Probability and Statistics using Python
practicals.desc: Generate normal distribution, compute statistical measures, and simulate probability experiments using NumPy, SciPy, and Matplotlib.

practicals.title: Practical 3: Data Analysis using Public Dataset
practicals.desc: Analyze a dataset from Kaggle or UCI repository, perform filtering, grouping, and aggregation operations.

practicals.title: Practical 4: Titanic Dataset Analysis
practicals.desc: Perform data preprocessing, visualization, and analysis on Titanic dataset using Pandas and Matplotlib/Seaborn.

practicals.title: Practical 5: Linear Regression Model
practicals.desc: Implement linear regression to predict house prices using Boston Housing dataset.

practicals.title: Practical 6: Logistic Regression Model
practicals.desc: Implement logistic regression to classify spam emails using SpamBase dataset.

practicals.title: Practical 7: Recommendation System
practicals.desc: Build a movie recommendation system using MovieLens dataset.

practicals.title: Practical 8: Uber Fare Prediction
practicals.desc: Perform preprocessing, outlier detection, correlation analysis, and regression modeling on Uber dataset.

practicals.title: Practical 9: Sales Dashboard using Power BI
practicals.desc: Create an interactive dashboard for sales analysis using Power BI.

practicals.title: Practical 10: HR Analytics Dashboard
practicals.desc: Design HR analytics dashboard to analyze employee metrics and attrition.

practicals.title: Practical 11: COVID-19 Data Visualization
practicals.desc: Analyze global COVID-19 trends using Tableau.

practicals.title: Practical 12: Student Performance Analysis
practicals.desc: Analyze factors affecting student performance using data science techniques and provide recommendations.
